channel.title: Automation on Aaron's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Aaron's Blog

item.title: Igris Growth Engine
item.description: Automated self-improvement loop. Every 2h cron, domain rotation, Gemini-powered search+build pipeline. 7am daily Slack digest of new ideas and proposals.

item.title: Background Agents System
item.description: Four persistent background agents auto-started via systemd on WSL2: night_watch (network/security, 5min), storage_watch (disk, 30min), docker_watch (containers, 5min), windows_space_watch (C: drive cleanup, 2h). Terminal banner shows green/red status on login.

item.title: Igris AI Assistant
item.description: Personal AI assistant — 22,000+ lines, 132 modules. 5-phase security hardening complete (secrets management, input validation, shell=True elimination, GUI/plugin hardening). Windows-primary. Memory backed by OneDrive JSON.

item.title: Gemini CLI Setup Completed
item.description: Completed installation and configuration of Gemini CLI with PowerShell functions. Overcame CORS and database errors. Integrated the CLI into the study workflow.
